CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended Notice Of Renewed Application For Appointment Of Receiver; For Temporary Restraining Order; And Order To Show Cause Re Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-31-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark J. Romero, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-395-9315), for Trust Deed Investments, Inc., Plaintiff and moving party.
No appearance by Defendant and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC.'s Renewed Application For Appointment Of Receiver; For Temporary Restraining Order; And Order To Show Cause Re Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED as requested, except paragraph 3a on page 2 of the Notice of Amended Motion is modified and the following language is stricken: "Exclude the defendants, or anyone claiming under or thorough them who does not have a valid lease or rental agreement for the possession of the Subject Property, or any portion thereof, from possession of the Subject Property. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Order To Show Cause For Tro, Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark J. Romeo, Esq., (415-395-9315) for Trust Deed Investments, Plaintiff and moving party
No Appearance for Defendant and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Order To Show Cause For Tro, Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction is DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to comply with Court's order directing service of summons, complaint, order and all papers in support of this motion/ex parte application by personal service no later than 4 p.m. November 22, 2013. Proof of service indicates that documents in support of the motion were served by posting on November 22, 2013. No proof of service for summons and complaint. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
